name: 1 Day Bromo Midnight Experience from Surabaya
description: 1-day private overnight tour from Surabaya: Mount Bromo midnight departure, stargazing at Penanjakan viewpoint, Bromo sunrise over the Tengger caldera, and private 4WD jeep to the crater base. No shared groups, ever. Licensed operator NIB 1102230032918.

item.name: Day 1 — Midnight Bromo Sunrise and Return to Surabaya
item.description: Midnight departure from Surabaya. Private transfer to Penanjakan viewpoint, Mount Bromo. Stargazing en route and at viewpoint. Bromo sunrise over the Tengger caldera. Private 4WD jeep to the crater base. Return to Surabaya by afternoon. No hotel stay — single continuous overnight trip.

subjectOf.name: Mount Bromo
subjectOf.description: Active volcano in the Tengger Semeru National Park. Penanjakan sunrise viewpoint and crater base accessed by private 4WD jeep. Elevation 2,329 m.

offers.description: Per-person price by group size: IDR 1,550,000 (2 pax) · IDR 1,400,000 (3) · IDR 1,300,000 (4–5) · IDR 1,200,000 (6–7) · IDR 1,100,000 (8–10) · IDR 1,000,000 (11+). All-inclusive: private transport, dedicated crew, entrance fees, private 4WD jeep, mineral water, T-shirt. No solo booking.

mainEntity.name: What is included in the 1 Day Bromo Midnight Experience price?

acceptedAnswer.text: All JVTO packages include: private transport (AC MPV for 1–3 guests, Toyota Hiace for 4–9), dedicated crew, all entrance fees and permits, mineral water, full pick-up to drop-off assistance, and a JVTO travel T-shirt. This tour additionally includes a private 4WD jeep for crater access at Mount Bromo. No accommodation is included — this is a single continuous overnight trip returning to Surabaya by afternoon. International flights, travel insurance, and personal expenses are not included. No solo booking; minimum 2 pax.

mainEntity.name: What happens if Mount Bromo is closed on my tour date?

acceptedAnswer.text: JVTO provides a written Plan B briefed before departure, not improvised at the gate. If Bromo closes due to volcanic activity or a park authority order, an alternative route is offered. Guests may rebook at no penalty if the primary site is inaccessible on the booked date due to official closure. JVTO monitors MAGMA Indonesia / PVMBG advisories daily and contacts guests proactively if closures are imminent.

mainEntity.name: Is this a private tour or a shared group tour?

acceptedAnswer.text: 100% private. Your booking covers your own vehicle, your own driver-guide (or driver + escort guide for larger groups), and your own itinerary. No strangers are added to your tour at any point. JVTO does not operate shared group tours.

mainEntity.name: What if Bromo is volcanically active during my visit?

acceptedAnswer.text: Mount Bromo is an active volcano. JVTO monitors MAGMA Indonesia / PVMBG status daily. If the alert level is raised to a point where access is restricted by the park authority (TNBTS), JVTO will notify you in advance and offer a rebook at no penalty or a discussion of alternative itineraries. We never take guests to a site that is officially closed.

mainEntity.name: What should I bring for the 1 Day Bromo Midnight Experience?

acceptedAnswer.text: Bromo nights are cold (5–10°C at Penanjakan). Bring layered warm clothing — a thermal base layer, a windproof jacket, and a hat and gloves. Sturdy walking shoes or light trekking shoes are recommended for the crater approach. A headlamp or phone torch is useful for the pre-dawn viewpoint walk. JVTO provides mineral water throughout the trip.
